metadata.name: Dorg
metadata.author: you
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Amberfield.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Amberfield
towns.description: A riverside town whose docks hum with the comings and goings of barges.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Den
key_dungeons.description: Crumbling pillars mark the way into Lost Den. Faint scratching echoes from deep within.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Lost Den and recover the lost Opal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.
